creator: support@nelsonandwright.com
text:
I am trying to install ucspi-ssl located at /usr/ports/sysutils/ucspi-ssl but the installation fails. I also tried installing this with the NO_CHECKSUM=YES and that fails as well stating the uncompress failed.

Fix: 

I do not know how to fix this :-)
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/ucspi-ssl
make install clean
